sceneData.title: Introduction
sceneData.imagePrompt: A sleek, silver Apple MacBook Air M2 floating against a minimalist grey background, angled to showcase its incredibly thin profile. Professional studio lighting, cinematic quality, 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.videoPrompt: best laptop with high end performance. Add subtle camera motion (slow push-in, pan, reveal).
sceneData.voiceLine: Introducing the tool that redefines productivity: the Apple MacBook Air M2 from New org.

sceneData.title: M2 Chip Performance
sceneData.imagePrompt: chip set and it have 24. Feature Apple MacBook Air M2 naturally in the frame. Keep composition vertical 9:16 and premium.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A slow zoom into the keyboard of the MacBook Air M2, with a futuristic, glowing blue digital overlay representing the powerful M2 chipset inside. Abstract data streams flow across the keys. 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: Engineered with a high-end performance chipset, it delivers speed and efficiency like never before.

sceneData.title: All-Day Battery
sceneData.imagePrompt: hrs battery with 8gb ram and. Feature Apple MacBook Air M2 naturally in the frame. Keep composition vertical 9:16 and premium.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A time-lapse shot of a professional working on the MacBook Air M2 in a modern office, as the background light changes from day to night. No charger is visible. A subtle battery icon in the corner stays full. 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: Work, create, and innovate for up to 24 hours on a single charge. Power that lasts all day, and then some.

sceneData.title: RAM and Storage
sceneData.imagePrompt: 512gb storage . it is best. Feature Apple MacBook Air M2 naturally in the frame. Keep composition vertical 9:16 and premium.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A clean, animated graphic on a grey background. The text '8GB RAM' and '512GB Storage' materializes with a smooth, professional animation. Minimalist icons representing speed and capacity appear next to the text. 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: With 8 gigabytes of unified memory and 512 gigabytes of super-fast storage, your workflow is seamless.

sceneData.title: Editing and Coding
sceneData.imagePrompt: for editinga and coding based work. Feature Apple MacBook Air M2 naturally in the frame. Keep composition vertical 9:16 and premium.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A dynamic vertical split-screen. The top half shows a close-up of a complex video timeline being edited flawlessly. The bottom half shows lines of code being written rapidly in a dark-mode IDE. 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: It’s the ultimate machine for demanding tasks, from high-resolution video editing to complex coding.

sceneData.title: Closing Shot
sceneData.imagePrompt: Product: Apple MacBook Air M2. Feature Apple MacBook Air M2 naturally in the frame. Keep composition vertical 9:16 and premium.
sceneData.videoPrompt: The MacBook Air M2 closes smoothly in a final, elegant hero shot on a clean studio background. The New org logo fades in below it. Soft, professional lighting. 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: Elevate your work. The Apple MacBook Air M2. Available now at New org.

scenes.voiceScript: Introducing the tool that redefines productivity: the Apple MacBook Air M2 from New org. Engineered with a high-end performance chipset, it delivers speed and efficiency like never before. Work, create, and innovate for up to 24 hours on a single charge. Power that lasts all day, and then some. With 8 gigabytes of unified memory and 512 gigabytes of super-fast storage, your workflow is seamless. It’s the ultimate machine for demanding tasks, from high-resolution video editing to complex coding. Elevate your work. The Apple MacBook Air M2. Available now at New org.
scenes.thumbnailPrompt: An ultra-realistic, cinematic shot of the Apple MacBook Air M2, slightly open on a clean, white desk. The screen glows faintly, reflecting a minimalist workspace. Studio lighting, 9:16 aspect ratio.
scenes.globalVisualStyle: Cinematic, minimalist, professional tech product showcase, clean studio lighting, shallow depth of field, high-resolution 8K, silver and grey color palette.

content.caption: Unleash your potential with the Apple MacBook Air M2! Experience unparalleled performance, 24-hour battery life, and seamless multitasking for all your editing and coding needs. Get yours today!
